uplink.description: Status report: contact open (Off), no shock, healthy battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data authored from the byte layout and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Off->open, 0x24=3.6V, 0x05DC=1500mm, fill 50%, no shock).

uplink.description: Status report: contact closed (On), shock/tamper alarm, low battery, all distance/fill alarms
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data authored from the byte layout and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (On->closed, 0xA4 low-battery flag + 3.6V, 0x0320=800mm, fill 75%, shock alarm, all threshold alarms set).
Synthetic frame derived from the TTN startup example (reportType byte 0x00), padded to the 11-byte status length; carries only version/datecode, not a measurement.
Config-response port carries no measurement; the normalized codec only decodes the fPort 22 data report.
